actionData.text: The air is thick with the smell of rot and plenty...
Hungry, little goat? Mother will feed you...
The feast never ends here. You can smell it before you see it...
The walls writhe. Something is alive in here...
The acid boils in enormous vats. The smell alone strips paint...
You thought you had reached the bottom. You were wrong.
The belly of gluttony itself. Everything it has consumed, it has kept.
